title: A TT&CK to CVE: A Large-Scale Automated

evidence_units.topic: 01 abstract cyber threat intelligence cti includes collecting
evidence_units.text_anchor: Abstract—Cyber threat intelligence (CTI) includes collecting and analyzing cybersecurity-related information across diverse and heterogeneous sources. Those sources may include repos- itories that curate vulnerabilities,
